stopCondition: policy applied on a tick + audited

testNames: filter validation: accepts 'by_status' with non-empty array
filter validation: rejects free-form or unknown kind
filter validation: rejects empty by_status array
filter validation: rejects status string longer than 64 chars
set: validates resource_table, ttl_seconds, and emits audit BEFORE write
set: audit-before-change: a failing audit port means the DB write never runs
disable: emits audit BEFORE the disable update + transitions state
disable: returns not_found when no enabled policy exists for the (org, table)
runRetentionTick: deletes un-held rows + records outcome + emits per-row audit events
runRetentionTick: skips_legal_hold: held rows are PRESERVED (consumes V1C-12c LegalHoldGuard)
runRetentionTick: skips: the (org, table) has no candidates
runRetentionTick: skips: filter yields zero candidates (in-memory: by_status with zero matching)
read: listForTenant only returns enabled policies; listAsOperator returns all
